# BioSphere Kids / SV2 Surface Assistant

This is an agent-readable orientation file for the public artifact at https://ariya-science.netlify.app.

## What this artifact is

A static browser-native lesson surface imported from the SV2 multi-subject branch and enhanced with a bounded Surface Assistant. The rendered page shows one lesson at a time, but the deployed artifact includes the full lesson/source/OKF structure.

## Source snapshot

- Upstream repo: https://github.com/Apotheosys1982/SV2
- Branch: origin/codex/multi-subject-geography-history
- Commit: 1091ecf
- Lesson count: 12
- Subjects: Science, Geography, History

## Read these first

1. /source-manifest.json - source posture, limits, commit, record counts.
2. /lessons/manifest.json - authoritative subject and lesson inventory.
3. /sitemap.xml - canonical public URLs for lessons, subjects, source files, and OKF files.
4. /okf/index.md - OKF-style agent-readable bundle map.
5. /answer-pack.json - bounded assistant answer pack.
6. /assistant/intent-taxonomy.json - route families, when present.

## Lesson files

- /lessons/lesson-01.json - Science / Lesson 1 — Plants & Animals
- /lessons/lesson-02.json - Science / Lesson 2 — Food Chains
- /lessons/lesson-03.json - Science / Lesson 3 — Ecosystems & Interdependence
- /lessons/lesson-04.json - Science / Lesson 04 — The Water Cycle
- /lessons/lesson-05.json - Science / Lesson 05 — Trees
- /lessons/lesson-06.json - Science / Lesson 06 — Habitats
- /lessons/geography-01.json - Geography / Lesson 1 — Maps & Globes
- /lessons/geography-02.json - Geography / Lesson 2 — Landforms & Bodies of Water
- /lessons/geography-03.json - Geography / Lesson 3 — Regions & Communities
- /lessons/history-01.json - History / Lesson 1 — History Detectives
- /lessons/history-02.json - History / Lesson 2 — Rivers, Cities & Early America
- /lessons/history-03.json - History / Lesson 3 — American Independence & World Ideas

- /okf/assistant/answer-style.md
- /okf/assistant/boundaries.md

- /okf/build/reconstruction-contract.md
- /okf/build/validation-commands.md

- /okf/concepts/biosphere-kids.md
- /okf/concepts/five-section-lesson-renderer.md
- /okf/concepts/okf-layer.md
- /okf/concepts/surface-assistant.md
- /okf/index.md
- /okf/log.md
- /okf/playbooks/agent-reconstruction-flow.md
- /okf/playbooks/lesson-audit-flow.md
- /okf/sources/source-manifest.md
- /okf/sources/source-posture.md
- /okf/ui/mobile-rules.md
- /okf/ui/source-links.md
- /okf/validation/readiness-checklist.md
- /okf/validation/test-suite.md

## Boundaries

The assistant is static and source-backed. It does not know private classroom records, student accounts, school policy, medical/safety guarantees, or live data. It can explain lessons, summarize teacher-note style answer guidance, route users through print/teacher/autosave behavior, and disclose source limits.
